login.title: Login or Register
login.subtitle: Enter your mobile number to get a one-time password (OTP).
login.phoneHelp: We'll send a one-time password by SMS.
login.roleHelp: Choose how you want to use the platform.

otp.title: Enter OTP
otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{phone}}.
otp.label: One-time password
otp.help: Didn't get the code? Check your SMS, or request a voice call.

logout.confirmBody: You'll need to log in again with your mobile number.

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

disabled.title: Account disabled
disabled.body: Your account has been disabled. Please contact the helpline for assistance.
